en: of it, but we're going to slow it down a little bit, I'm guessing most of you folks have heard
ko: of it, but we're going to slow it down a little bit, I'm guessing most of you folks have heard
ja: ですが、少し速度を落とします。ほとんどの人が聞いたことがあると思います
zhTW: 但我們要放慢一點速度，我猜你們大多數人都聽過
vi: nhưng chúng ta sẽ nói chậm lại một chút, tôi đoán hầu hết các bạn đã nghe nói
